description.text: Close quarters combat inside of the house. One Cube and a Base.

es.original: Close quarters combat inside of the house. One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Combate en un espacio reducido.
Un generador y un núcleo.

fr.original: Close quarters combat inside of the house. One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Un combat au corps à corps entre les murs. Deux cubes et une base.

de.original: Close quarters combat inside of the house. One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Nahkampf im Hausinneren. Ein Generator und eine Basis.

ru.original: Close quarters combat inside of the house. One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Ближний бой внутри дома. Один куб и база.

pt.original: Close quarters combat inside of the house. One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Combate à queima-roupa dentro de uma casa. Um Cubo e uma Base.
